# DiscoverMinds.ai

> DiscoverMinds.ai is your secret weapon for professional networking. This mutual network-sharing platform uses AI-powered search to help you find the right connections instantly, turning your network into your competitive advantage.

DiscoverMinds.ai leverages advanced AI technology to analyze professional networks and deliver targeted search results. The platform transforms how you discover talent, opportunities, and partnerships by making your extended network searchable and actionable. Key features include:

- AI-powered search for finding professionals based on detailed criteria
- Network mapping to visualize connections
- Warm introduction facilitation
- Privacy-focused approach to network sharing
## Main Pages

- [Homepage](https://discoverminds.ai/): Overview of the platform's capabilities and value proposition
- [About](https://discoverminds.ai/about): Information about the company, team, and mission
- [Pricing](https://discoverminds.ai/pricing): Subscription plans and pricing details

## Features

- [Search Interface](https://discoverminds.ai/user-query): AI-powered search interface for finding professional connections
- [User Authentication](https://discoverminds.ai/user-auth): User login and registration system

## Legal

- [Terms of Service](https://discoverminds.ai/terms): User agreement and platform terms
- [Privacy Policy](https://discoverminds.ai/privacy-policy): Data handling practices and user privacy information

## Optional

- [Sitemap](https://discoverminds.ai/sitemap.xml): Complete site structure in XML format
